signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Below 2.3-2.4% Consensus)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

South Korea's Statistics Korea reported on April 2, 2026, that annual consumer price inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but tempered by government fuel caps and food vouchers; monthly CPI rose 0.3% vs. 0.6% expected, with cor
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: US and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire in Middle East Conflict | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]
signals.raw:
US and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire in Middle East Conflict | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]

Mediated by Pakistan's PM Shehbaz Sharif with Türkiye and Egypt, the deal averts US strikes on Iranian infrastructure after Trump's deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz; it takes immediate effect, includes Lebanon per Sharif (disputed by Israel's Netanyahu), and sets US-Iran talks in Islamabad o
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Will Russia enter Ternuvate again by April 30?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30, 2026?

signals.headline: **Vance/CPAC Straw Poll (March 2026)**: J
signals.raw: **Vance/CPAC Straw Poll (March 2026)**: J.D. Vance won 53% in a CPAC straw poll for the 2028 GOP presidential nomination; not Oregon-related or election-defining.[1]

signals.raw: **Colorado GOP (April 12, 2026)**: Republicans selected Scott Bottoms (45%) and Victor Marks (39%) for their June 30 gubernatorial primary; this is Colorado, not Oregon.[2]

signals.headline: **Oregon Context**: 2022 election info (Tina Kotek won as Democrat) and a pre-2026 forum for potential Republican challe
signals.raw:
**Oregon Context**: 2022 election info (Tina Kotek won as Democrat) and a pre-2026 forum for potential Republican challengers to Kotek; nothing recent or resolved.[3][4]

No confirmed developments link these terms to an Oregon Republican governor race announcement. Prediction markets unchanged. **NO | LOW confidence** (due to recency check and result limits).

signals.headline: SEC and CFTC Classify Solana (SOL) as Digital Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC and CFTC Classify Solana (SOL) as Digital Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Regulatory bodies have classified digital assets like Solana as commodities, providing clarity that shifts it from regulatory headwind to catalyst, with SOL trading near $82 amid institutional interest.[2]

signals.headline: Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Interactive Brokers enabled direct SOL trading for Europeans via Zero Hash, expanding institutional access despite price compression at support levels.[2]

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | MED confidence**  
Network reached all-time high of 167M monthly holders and 148M daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026, driven by Alpenglow upgrade promising 150ms finality.[1]
matched_markets: Will the price of Solana be above $100 on April 18?
Solana Up or Down - April 17, 4:40AM-4:45AM ET

signals.headline: $280M+ Exploit Hits Solana's Drift Protocol via Social Engineering | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
$280M+ Exploit Hits Solana's Drift Protocol via Social Engineering | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Attacker seized admin control using social engineering and pre-approved transactions; Circle had 6-hour window to freeze $230M+ USDC but did not, eroding ecosystem trust with SOL at $78.[7]
